title: When status of Board X changes to something then change status of Board Y to something
excerpt:

posts.author: Jo.learning (Jo Flintham)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have read many of the forums posts on this and still I don’t have suitable outcome.

I have the automation of 'when status changed to Allocated then, create an item in Quotes and Billing and connect Job cards with Quotes and Billing.
This creates a nice link from my job boards to the quote and invoicing board BUT I can’t then work out how to have a dynamic status change.
1 - If i use mirror I can’t create automation in Quotes and Billing from this column.
2- I can’t find an automation that will allow When status in Job board changes to done then move linked item i Quotes and Billing to Ready to invoice group OR change status of item in Quotes and Billing to ready to invoice.

I am at a loss to find the answer. Have I missed it somewhere? We want to use Monday to drive the business but I feel like there are some basics missing.
Help

posts.author: HarjotB (Harjot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you tried the solution by adding multiple actions in the automation? Effectively the automation in the attached screenshot will create an item in multiple boards and connect them with originating board? Hope this helps

Screenshot attached.

Screenshot 2024-07-01 1922501197×427 25.5 KB

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Jo.learning & @HarjotB

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, here’s how it can be used in this case →

Move item to group →

Screenshot 2024-07-13 at 20.27.141844×322 19.9 KB

Change status →

Screenshot 2024-07-13 at 20.26.482132×498 25.4 KB

Also worth adding that it also supports -

  1. Automatically connecting items based on conditions and flexible logic.
  2. Automatically removing connecting.
  3. Syncing values between connected items.
  4. Cross-board automations (trigger in the connected board and action in the current board)

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - Connected Boards Automations - monday.com App Marketplace

Hope that helps!
